title: Claude Code just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Claude Code is a CMS platform that enables building client-editable websites without manual backend work. The tutorial demonstrates using Claude Code alongside MongoDB, Vercel, and GitHub to generate responsive websites with built-in content management systems that clients can edit safely.
